title: 14” Small Teddy Bear, Grey Teddy Bear, Cuddly Companion for Kids, Small Soft Plush Toys for Baby Shower, Birthdays and Nursery Decor (35cm, Light Grey)
features: Soft and Cuddly Design: Made with premium plush fabric, this grey teddy bear provides a soft and comforting touch; The small size makes it easy for children to hold and carry; Ideal for hugging and offering emotional support

Durable Construction: Crafted with high-quality materials and reinforced stitching for long-lasting use; The PP cotton filling ensures a fluffy and lightweight feel while maintaining its shape; Safe for children with no small parts

Versatile Use: Perfect as a bedtime companion to help children feel secure; Can be used as nursery decor or a photography prop; Suitable for various occasions including birthdays and special celebrations
Easy Maintenance: Simple to clean with spot washing using mild detergent; The plush fabric retains its softness after cleaning; Designed to withstand frequent use and hugs without losing its shape

Thoughtful Gift Choice: A charming and heartwarming gift for children aged 0-12; The small soft plush toy is perfect for parents and gift givers looking for a meaningful present; Brings joy and comfort to any child's life
description: Product description This grey teddy bear from ZPSCXQ is a perfect companion for children aged 0-12. Measuring 35cm, it is designed to be soft, cuddly, and safe for little ones. The teddy bear features a cute bow, adding a charming touch to its appearance. Made with high-quality plush fabric and PP cotton filling, it offers a lightweight and fluffy feel while maintaining its shape over time. Ideal for bedtime, nursery decor, or as a photography prop, this small teddy bear is versatile and suitable for various occasions. Its durable construction ensures long-lasting use, and the easy-to-clean design makes maintenance simple. Whether as a gift or a personal keepsake, this grey teddy bear brings joy and comfort to any child's life. Safety Warning No Safety Warning
